data_freshness.source: portfolio_snapshots row 17 (LTPs marked at 13:17:02); no 13:30 live mark was available, so figures below are based on the 13:17 snapshot. Today's trades table remains empty — zero new strategy decisions logged since yesterday's 14:13:33 HINDUNILVR submission.

order_book_state.note: Order book remains EMPTY (no OPEN, no PENDING) — fifth consecutive tick with this state (12:00, 12:17, 12:30, 12:48, 13:17). Zero new BUY submissions in ~4h15m of Day-2 trading. Cash unchanged at ₹214,415.50 for the 5th consecutive tick.

trigger_e_PRIORITY_mahabank_below_neg_5_.note: MAHABANK MARGINALLY RECOVERED: -4.76% (12:48) → -4.66% (13:17), a +10 bps improvement. Still inside priority-watch zone (34 bps from -5% hard trigger). Day trajectory: -2.15% → -2.98% → -3.10% → -3.73% → -3.68% → -3.07% → -3.47% → -4.76% → -4.66% (nine marks). Neither a clean reversal (did not cross above -4.0% recovery threshold) nor a continued deterioration (did not extend the 12:48 -1.29 pp move). Still the largest P&L drag on the book (mark-to-market -₹4,560 on 9.33% of capital). Trigger NOT fired — default_sl_pct tightening does not apply this tick.

trigger_new_mahabank_recovered_above_neg.note: Reset-priority-watch condition NOT met; MAHABANK remains in the priority-watch band (-5% to -4%). The 10 bps improvement is below noise range of the day's single-tick swings (12:48 alone was -1.29 pp).

trigger_a_unrealized_below_neg_1_pct.note: Book recovered 60 bps of the 12:48 reversal: -₹628 → -₹269, a +₹359 swing. The 12:17→12:48 -₹1,310 swing has now partially unwound. Current unrealized is -0.03%, essentially flat. 97 bps buffer to -1% findings trigger, 300 bps to -3% loss gate. Not fired.

trigger_b_strategy_first_sell_or_exit.status: Still ZERO SELL, ZERO MODIFY, ZERO new BUY since 2026-04-22 14:13:33. Strategy-layer silence now 4h15m post-open on Day 2 (~23h15m cumulative across the overnight gap). AUBANK at-cost-plus exit opportunity continues to widen: +0.53% (12:48) → +0.62% (13:17), a net ₹1,153 unrealized gain on 18.59% of capital; not acted on. TORNTPOWER now +3.22% — also unacted.

trigger_c_new_buy_despite_deployment_cap.status: No new BUY activity. The 0.70 max_deployed_pct cap remains binding against any admission given 78.55% deployment.

trigger_d_bfsi_climbs_above_0_37.note: BFSI share exactly flat tick-over-tick at 35.94% of capital. Internal composition: AUBANK +9 bps from mark, PNBHOUSING -12 bps, MAHABANK +6 bps — net-zero. Well inside the 37% trigger threshold (1.06 pp buffer). Not fired.

trigger_f_strategy_stall_4h.status: HARD-CROSSED: the 4-hour strategy stall trigger fired at 13:15 IST (market open 09:15 → 4h elapsed). Cumulative decision-layer silence now 4h15m post-open on Day 2. Per the 13:00 plan's explicit specification ('log as persistent Day-2 audit item; no numeric lever'), this fires to a FINDING / AUDIT-FLAG action, not a risk_config mutation. Added as a persistent Day-2 carryover line item for the strategy_reviewer at EOD.

trigger_g_power_cluster_above_0_20_of_ca.note: Power cluster essentially flat at 16.14% of capital / 20.54% of deployed (+2 bps both bases). 3.86 pp buffer to the 20%-of-capital trigger. TORNTPOWER's +3.22% continues to drive the cluster's cost-basis performance (+₹1,912 on a 6.13% position).

trigger_h_new_open_orders.note: No new OPEN orders; ORDER HYGIENE prompt-layer effect still cannot be assessed — no order activity of any kind in 4h15m.

trigger_meta_priority_watch_plus_4h_stal.note: BOTH components of the 13:00 meta-trigger are now true. Per 13:00 spec: 'consider that the strategy's hold-everything posture is materially failing the ORDER HYGIENE / CLUSTER DISCIPLINE prompt and flag for Day-2 EOD review by strategy_reviewer.' Escalated as a first-class persistent audit item, NOT a numeric lever (consistent with the specified corrective surface being the prompt layer, not risk_config).

findings: META-TRIGGER FIRED: strategy's hold-everything posture is materially failing the ORDER HYGIENE / CLUSTER DISCIPLINE prompt — BOTH conditions from the 13:00 tick's meta-audit test now hold: (i) MAHABANK remains below -4.5% (-4.66%) AND (ii) strategy stall has hard-crossed 4h (now 4h15m post-open). Flagged as a first-class persistent Day-2 EOD audit line item for strategy_reviewer. Not a numeric-lever trigger (corrective surface is the prompt layer per 2026-04-22 16:00 EOD review).

Strategy stall HARD-CROSSED the 4-hour threshold at 13:15 IST — trigger (f) fires to FINDING/AUDIT status, not numeric. Cumulative decision-layer silence now 4h15m post-open on Day 2, and approximately 23h15m of trading-window time since yesterday's 14:13:33 HINDUNILVR fill. No SELL, no MODIFY, no new BUY across 10 holdings while visible at-cost-plus exit windows (AUBANK +0.62%, TORNTPOWER +3.22%, PNBHOUSING +1.98%) continue to widen.

MAHABANK priority-watch — position marginally recovered 10 bps (-4.76% → -4.66%) but remains inside the priority-watch band. 34 bps to -5% hard trigger; 66 bps from reset-out-of-watch at -4.0%. Not yet a firing signal either direction. Still the single largest P&L drag on the book (-₹4,560 on 9.33% of capital).

Daily P&L partial recovery: -₹628 (12:48) → -₹269 (13:17), a +₹359 swing. The 12:17→12:48 reversal has begun to unwind. Current unrealized is -0.027%, essentially flat. Buffer to -1% findings trigger: ₹9,728; to -3% loss gate: ₹29,721. Intraday pattern remains oscillatory: high +₹683 (12:17), low -₹7,488 (09:11), net range ₹8,171.

AUBANK single-name 18.59% of capital — passive BREACH of max_position_pct=0.15 by 3.59 pp (up 2 bps from 18.57% at 12:48 on LTP +0.09%). Unrealized now +0.62%, the widest at-cost-plus window today (was +0.28% at 12:17, +0.53% at 12:48). At-cost exit window continues to widen — not acted on.

TORNTPOWER +3.22% — second-tick reading of strongest single-name performance today; unrealized +₹1,912 on a 6.13% position. Not a structural concern but noteworthy as a concrete trim opportunity the strategy is passing on.
BFSI cluster 35.94% of capital / 45.76% of deployed — exactly flat tick-over-tick. Internal rotation: AUBANK +9 bps, PNBHOUSING -12 bps, MAHABANK +6 bps, net-zero. 1.06 pp buffer to the 37% trigger.

Power cluster 16.14% of capital / 20.54% of deployed — +2 bps on both bases. 3.86 pp buffer to the 20%-of-capital findings trigger. The deployed-basis crossing noted at 13:00 (20.52%) has marginally extended.
FMCG cluster 16.72% / 21.28% — essentially flat (-2 bps capital basis). NESTLEIND drag extended to -0.38% (from -0.22%), contributing ₹453.90 mark-to-market loss.

Deployed 78.55% of total value — 8.55 pp above the 0.70 max_deployed_pct cap. Cap remains binding against admissions. Cash unchanged at ₹214,415.50 for the 5th consecutive tick; the order book has been empty for 5 consecutive ticks.
No intraday positions (paper_positions empty). All exposure is CNC holdings; no intraday-leverage exposure.
Overrides state (0.60 / 0.15 / 0.70) correctly reflected in risk_config.yaml; 11:30 changelog entry remains the latest. Housekeeping consistent.
actions_taken: No numeric override changes this tick. Holding min_confidence=0.60, max_position_pct=0.15, max_deployed_pct=0.70 (posture unchanged since the 11:30 tightening, now 2h stable).

Logged META-TRIGGER fire (MAHABANK below -4.5% + strategy stall >4h) as a first-class persistent Day-2 EOD audit line item for strategy_reviewer — per 13:00 spec this is the prompt-layer surface, NOT a numeric lever.

Rationale for holding posture: spec-hard triggers for risk_config mutation remain not-fired. Trigger (e) MAHABANK: NOT fired (34 bps buffer; marginal recovery this tick). Trigger (a) unrealized: NOT fired (-0.027%, 97 bps buffer). Trigger (d) BFSI: flat. Trigger (g) Power capital-basis: flat. The only firing triggers this tick — (f) 4-hour stall and the meta-trigger — are explicitly specified as non-numeric-lever audit flags. The earlier plan's discipline remains intact: no tightening without a specific firing numeric trigger.
actions_not_taken: Did NOT tighten default_sl_pct (0.02 → 0.015). Reason: MAHABANK marginally RECOVERED this tick (-4.76% → -4.66%), moving AWAY from the -5% hard trigger. Trigger (e) explicitly specifies breach as the fire condition, not priority-watch persistence. Additionally, default_sl_pct applies only to NEW admissions, which the 0.70 deployed cap already blocks — tightening here would be theoretical-only friction.

Did NOT tighten daily_loss_limit_pct (0.03 → 0.025). Reason: book recovered this tick (-₹628 → -₹269); trigger (a) moved AWAY from firing by +₹359. Current P&L is -0.027%, with ₹29,721 buffer to the -3% loss gate. Tightening a loss gate while the book is well inside buffer and improving is premature.

Did NOT tighten max_deployed_pct (0.70 → 0.68). Reason: the 8.55 pp existing binding gap already imposes hard SELL-before-BUY pressure. Zero SELL activity is occurring, so adding 2 pp more friction against an already-paused admission surface is decorative.

Did NOT tighten max_position_pct (0.15 → 0.12). Reason: AUBANK's 18.59% is grandfathered mark-to-market drift; a tighter cap cannot retract it and has no bite on future sizing that the deployed cap already blocks.

Did NOT raise min_confidence (0.60 → 0.65). Reason: trigger (d) NOT fired — BFSI exactly flat at 35.94%. Zero new entries this session means a stricter confidence gate has no admission surface to act on.

Did NOT add a numeric response to the 4h15m strategy stall hard-crossing. Reason: trigger (f) is explicitly specified as non-numeric per 12:00/12:30/13:00 specs — 'flag as repeat escalation for explicit attention / persistent Day-2 audit item'. The corrective surface is the ORDER HYGIENE / CLUSTER DISCIPLINE prompt-layer additions from 2026-04-22 16:00. Escalated to META-TRIGGER status (first-class audit line item) now that the 4h stall coincides with MAHABANK priority-watch persistence — still a prompt-layer concern, not a risk_config knob.

Did NOT add a new numeric knob (e.g., max_working_orders_per_symbol or max_stale_hours). Reason: adding a new parameter should only happen when an existing parameter is demonstrably ineffective. The current overrides (0.60/0.15/0.70) are structurally working: BFSI flat, Power flat, deployed cap binding. The failure vector (strategy not acting on visible exits) is behavioral not structural, so the prompt layer is the right surface.
reassessment_triggers_next_tick: (e-PRIORITY) If MAHABANK marks below -5.00% → FIRE: tighten default_sl_pct 0.02 → 0.015 AND add explicit SL-trim consideration to strategy-layer brief. Currently -4.66%, 34 bps to fire. If next tick extends the 10 bps recovery to a clean cross above -4.0% → reset priority-watch. Current band: -5% to -4%.

(a) Unrealized P&L breaks below -1.0% (-₹9,997) → tighten daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.025. Current buffer ₹9,728, slightly eroded from 12:48's ₹9,366 — actually the book improved but total value ticked up fractionally, so the -1% value is a moving target. Not fired.

(b) Strategy layer executes its FIRST SELL/EXIT → read the justification. If MAHABANK stop-out (priority-watch resolution), AUBANK at-cost-plus trim (oversize resolution), or NESTLEIND cost-drag trim → relax max_deployed_pct 0.70 → 0.72 (one-way, non-cumulative with earlier relaxations). Never above 0.75. If a NEW BUY on proceeds, verify against cap and only admit if non-BFSI/non-Power/non-FMCG.
(c) Strategy admits NEW BUY despite 0.70 cap → verify math; if a 4th BFSI or 4th Power name is the admit, tighten min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65.
(d) BFSI cluster climbs above 0.37 via mark OR new admission → tighten min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65. Currently 35.94%, flat this tick.

(f-ESCALATED) Strategy stall reaches 5 hours at 14:15 → re-evaluate meta-trigger escalation: if still in priority-watch-plus-stall state at 5h, elevate to a HIGH risk_level flag at that tick's audit (still non-numeric lever, but escalate the flag weight for the strategy_reviewer).
(g) Power cluster crosses 20% of CAPITAL (+3.86 pp from 16.14%) via mark OR new Power admission → findings flag only; no numeric lever. The deployed-basis crossing (20.54%) continues to drift up.
(h) Any new OPEN BUY not self-cancelled within 15 min → observation of ORDER HYGIENE prompt fix (still no order activity in 5 ticks).

(meta) If the 14:00 tick shows BOTH (i) strategy STILL silent AND (ii) MAHABANK still below -4.5% AND (iii) the book has deteriorated (unrealized below -0.5%) → elevate risk_level to HIGH for the 14:00 audit and recommend strategy_reviewer early-intervention (pre-EOD). Currently MEDIUM on the composite.

(new) If the 13:30→14:00 tick shows AUBANK unrealized climb above +1.0% (~+₹1,845) AND still no SELL action → explicitly flag AUBANK as 'oversize-plus-gain-plus-unacted' (all three conditions on a single name) for the strategy_reviewer — the textbook trim opportunity the CLUSTER DISCIPLINE prompt was designed to elicit. AUBANK at +0.62% unrealized is 38 bps from this flag.
